description: Visual tools for managing pipelines, planning strategic accounts, building repeatable playbooks, and tracking deal performance to align revenue teams around a single source of truth

templates.name: Sales Pipeline
templates.description: Horizontal Kanban-style pipeline with deal cards, stage conversion metrics, velocity tracking, and aging deal alerts

templates.name: Account Planning
templates.description: Strategic account canvas with stakeholder mapping, relationship matrix, competitive landscape, and quarterly action plans

templates.name: Sales Playbook
templates.description: End-to-end sales motion codified with ICP, outreach sequences, discovery framework, objection handling, and competitor battlecards

templates.name: Deal Tracker
templates.description: Revenue dashboard with active deal table, forecast breakdown, win/loss analysis, and team performance leaderboard
